name: What proof do I need for my repetitive strain injury claim in Bountiful?
description: Doctor report + records proving work causation; report timely.[1]

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my repetitive strain injury claim in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Doctor report + records proving work causation; report timely.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Doctor's report detailing how/when/where work caused it (Form 123); medical records, witness accounts.[1][5] Key factors: Report within 180 days; employer form 122.[1] Track symptoms progression.[1] Preserve evidence fast.[5]
